title: chrysanthemum clusii
intro: Chrysanthemum clusii, also known as the golden chamomile or Clusius chrysanthemum, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family. It is native to the mountainous regions of China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Chrysanthemum clusii include reducing stress and anxiety, improving sleep quality, and easing symptoms of menopause, such as hot flashes and mood swings. Chrysanthemum clusii can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and extracts, which can be consumed as a dietary supplement or used topically to treat skin conditions.
